0.content:
# Instantiations & Adoption

All codespace instantiations across the [dynatrace-wwse](https://github.com/dynatrace-wwse) enablement framework — real users, CI runs, and global reach.

[← CI/CD](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/14e4b002-1b7d-4543-927b-cd0497ee8a2e) · [← Overview](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/27ea9191-533f-4911-89ae-ef96fe63c7ef) · [GitHub Pages →](https://geu80787.apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.dashboards/dashboard/a20a6def-bbb5-46da-a0c9-1b7e2566e4af)

1.title: Total Instantiations
1.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Real User Codespaces
2.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter content.codespace.type == "github-codespaces"
| summarize total = count()

3.title: Error Rate %
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(content.codespace.errors != "0")
| fieldsAdd errorRate = round(toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| fields errorRate

4.title: Active Repositories
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| summarize repos = countDistinct(content.repository.name)

5.title: Countries Reached
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.geo.country.name)
| summarize countries = countDistinct(content.geo.country.name)

6.title: Instantiations Over Time
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: { content.codespace.type }, interval: 1d

7.title: City-Level Instantiations
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.geo.latitude) and content.geo.latitude != 0
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.geo.city.name, content.geo.latitude, content.geo.longitude }
| fields content.geo.latitude, content.geo.longitude, count, content.geo.city.name

8.title: Instantiations by Country
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.geo.country.name)
| fieldsAdd countryCode = coalesce(content.geo.country.isoCode, if(content.geo.country.name == "United States", "US", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "United Kingdom", "GB", else: if(contains(content.geo.country.name, "Netherlands"), "NL", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Australia", "AU", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "New Zealand", "NZ", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Singapore", "SG", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Spain", "ES", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Germany", "DE", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "France", "FR", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "India", "IN", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Japan", "JP", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Brazil", "BR", else: if(content.geo.country.name == "Canada", "CA", else: "XX")))))))))))))
| summarize count = count(), by: { countryCode }
| fields countryCode, count

9.title: By Repository
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.repository.name }
| sort count desc
| limit 25

10.title: Instantiation Type

11.title: OS Architecture

12.title: Top Countries
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.geo.country.name)
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.geo.country.name }
| sort count desc
| limit 15

13.title: Errors Over Time
13.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| makeTimeseries total = count(), errors = countIf(content.codespace.errors != "0"), interval: 1d

14.title: Error Details
14.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter content.codespace.errors != "0"
| fields timestamp, content.repository.name, content.codespace.errors, content.codespace.type, content.geo.city.name, content.geo.country.name
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 30

15.title: Dynatrace Tenants Used
15.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.tenant) and content.tenant != ""
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.tenant, content.codespace.type }
| sort count desc
| limit 30

16.title: Repos by Country
16.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| filter isNotNull(content.geo.country.name)
| summarize count = count(), by: { content.repository.name, content.geo.country.name }
| sort count desc
| limit 40

17.title: Instantiations by Repository Over Time
17.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "com.dynatracewwse.codespacestracker"
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: { content.repository.name }, interval: 1d
| sort count desc
| limit 10
